spec.name: Soul Transform Field
spec.summary: reconfigures soul energy in a field volume by changing existing conditions
spec.effect_description: The caster inscribes a sigil that reconfigures soul energy in a field volume by changing existing conditions. Effect range: line-of-sight. Persistence: permanent.
